div.div:
━━ Gold border — L2 backbone (BB-1, BB-2) or L1/L2 ABR
━━ White border — L1 leaf router (BR-1 through BR-5)
━━ Red border — ASBR (IS-IS + OSPF boundary)
█ Blue container — L2 backbone area (49.0001)
█ Teal container — L1 stub area (49.0002, 49.0003, 49.0004)
█ Orange dashed — OSPF stub domain
─── Solid white — IS-IS adjacency
- - - Orange dashed — OSPF adjacency
━━━ Teal bar — shared broadcast LAN (DIS election)

switch.text: ━━ Gold border — L2 backbone (BB-1, BB-2) or L1/L2 ABR...
